scripts.dmg:mac: rm -rf release/dmg-staging && mkdir -p release/dmg-staging && cp -R release/TuneTag-darwin-arm64/TuneTag.app release/dmg-staging/ && ln -s /Applications release/dmg-staging/Applications && rm -f release/TuneTag.dmg && hdiutil create -volname "TuneTag" -srcfolder release/dmg-staging -ov -format UDZO release/TuneTag.dmg
scripts.dmg:mac:slim: rm -rf release-slim/dmg-staging && mkdir -p release-slim/dmg-staging && cp -R release-slim/TuneTag-darwin-arm64/TuneTag.app release-slim/dmg-staging/ && ln -s /Applications release-slim/dmg-staging/Applications && rm -f release-slim/TuneTag-slim.dmg && hdiutil create -volname "TuneTag" -srcfolder release-slim/dmg-staging -ov -format UDZO release-slim/TuneTag-slim.dmg
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run pack:mac && npm run dmg:mac
scripts.dist:mac:slim: npm run build && npm run pack:mac:slim && npm run dmg:mac:slim
